case_title: POLIAKIN GILDA VS PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,840.00 FILED BY POLIAKIN GILDA AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
